'''Tir'uh''' was a [[Noehon]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] criminal and a high-ranking member of the [[Mytaranor Slaving Council]]. A successful [[Slavery/Legends|slaver]], Tir'uh was considered a threat by the [[Task Force on Alliance Security]], who mistakenly believed her to be the leader of the Council.

==Biography==
Tir'uh was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Noehon]] who earned a living as a [[Slavery/Legends|slaver]]<ref name="air" /> — something infrequent among female Noehons, who were mostly considered slaves in their native [[Planet/Legends|planet]].<ref name="GG">''[[Galaxy Guide 12: Aliens — Enemies and Allies]]''</ref> For decades during the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], Tir'uh worked in criminal affairs, usually related to slavery. She traveled from [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]] to [[Bnar VII]], and was said to know all of the locales selling slaves among those two planets.<ref name="air" />

Tir'uh joined the [[Mytaranor Slaving Council]] and was so important that the [[Task Force on Alliance Security]] thought for a long time that Tir'uh was the leader. The discovery of a different leader, [[Talas Piran]], led the Task Force to reevaluate Tir'uh's responsibilities; they eventually decided that she was serving as "elder statesbeing", providing insight and advice.<ref name="air" /> She was nonetheless clearly identified as a high-ranking member of the Council<ref name="GG" />

Tir'uh and Piran hooked up with a failed [[Krish (species)/Legends|Krish]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] by the name of [[Karalan]]. Kalaran managed to get their sympathies and they hired him as a part of the [[Vanquisher (Kiltirin-class)|''Vanquisher'']] security team.<ref name="air" />
